mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id, sales_document_id, COUNT(*)::int AS package_count, SUM(CASE WHEN receipt_status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::int AS received_package_count FROM dealer_shipment WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'CANCELLED') AND tenant_id IN #{id} AND sales_document_id IN #{id} GROUP BY tenant_id, sales_document_id
